spec.name: f7_invalid_id_format

definitions.term: INVALID: term "Bad-Name" contains a hyphen and uppercase characters.

spec.clause: INVALID: id "bad-id" contains a hyphen, which is not in [a-z0-9_].
INVALID: id "1..2" has an empty segment between consecutive dots.
INVALID: id "1.Bad" contains an uppercase character, which is not in [a-z0-9_].
